full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Identify key assumptions of the DPM paper with violation scenarios
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Identify at least three assumptions specific to the DPM paper (Felzenszwalb et al. 2010). For each, explain why the method requires it, give a concrete violation scenario, and cite the paper section.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Added a fourth assumption (bounding box annotation reliability). Cross-checked all paper references and rewrote violation scenarios to be more concrete and exam-appropriate.

top_5_prompts: What assumptions does the DPM star-structured model make about part spatial relationships?
Why does the DPM assume HOG features are sufficient? When would this fail?
Explain the small deformation assumption implied by the quadratic penalty in Equation 3.
How does the Latent SVM training depend on bounding box annotation quality?
Give a concrete scenario where the star topology assumption of the DPM is violated.

student_declaration.statement: I confirm this file accurately reports LLM usage for this task.
